mapper.select: select exchange_id, user_id, request_no, wag_amount, rate, target_currency, target_amount, status, error_msg, create_time, update_time from sys_miner_exchange_log where request_no = #{requestNo} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into sys_miner_exchange_log(user_id, request_no, wag_amount, rate, target_currency, target_amount, status, error_msg, create_time, update_time) values(#{userId}, #{requestNo}, #{wagAmount}, #{rate}, #{targetCurrency}, #{targetAmount}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, now(), now())
